missions.name: Activate Great Eagle Statue
missions.description: Research Team Members: While we've only uncovered a mere fraction of the mysteries present on the Palpagos Islands, there have been multiple reports regarding the stone statues scattered about the isles. Although the mechanics remain unknown, it is possible to instantly travel from one of these bird-like structures to another. As such, using the area around those statues as a base of operations is highly recommended.

missions.name: How to Stay Alive
missions.description: Intro: This Survival Guide contains the sum of our hard-earned knowledge, gained through grueling first-hand experiences. Too much happens on these islands that defies common sense. If you ever get stuck, look to this guide for help.

missions.name: First Gathering Run
missions.description: Of all the resources you can gather from nature, is the foundation for nearly every tool and structure. Pick up fallen branches or strike nearby trees to start collecting.

missions.name: Base of Operations
missions.description: Materials on their own are merely raw resources. By assembling a Workbench, you'll gain the ability to craft more complex items. Open the Build menu, select the , and choose where to place it. This marks your first step to building your base and surviving these wilds.

missions.name: Unlock Technology
missions.description: On this island, coexistence with Pals is the key to survival. And it all begins with a single device: the . Open the Technology menu and study its blueprint. The time has come to reclaim the power of the ancients.

missions.name: Paldium
missions.description: These islands are home to an extraordinary mineral infused with supernatural energy: an ore known as Paldium. It's believed to be deeply connected to the massive tree towering in the distance, though the details remain a mystery. What we do know is that Paldium is a versatile material essential for crafting s. It's commonly found near water, so explore riversides and wetlands. If you spot something glowing blue, try striking it with a pickaxe. You can craft a pickaxe by combining and at a .

missions.name: Capturing Device
missions.description: s are vessels used to capture Pals. Think of them as your key to companionship. Craft s by combining materials at a . All you need is , , and s.

missions.name: Your First Pal
missions.description: Throw a at a Pal to try and capture it. To boost your chances for success, weaken it first. Once you catch your first Pal, the two of you can form a bond unlike any other.

missions.name: Palbox
missions.description: To truly coexist with Pals, proper management is essential. Ancient records describe storage technology known as the . Open the Technology screen to learn how to build one. The also has the ability to heal injured Pals.

missions.name: Starting Base
missions.description: Open the Build menu with and place a on a wide, open stretch of land. This will be your first base with your Pals—your launch point for future expeditions. If you maintain it well, it will become a vital stronghold when the time comes to face a tower, so choose your location carefully.

missions.name: Put Pals to Work
missions.description: Pals don't just fight, they can also work alongside you to help keep your base running. Access the , open the Management menu, and assign one of your Pals to the base.

missions.name: Fill Your Belly
missions.description: Whether you're battling or exploring, you can't forget to eat. Fortunately, this island is home to plants that bear delicious fruit. Keep an eye out for . If you find some, open your inventory and use them to satisfy your hunger.

missions.name: Protect Yourself
missions.description: The unforgiving wilds of the Palpagos Islands show mercy to no one. To protect yourself from the cold and harm, you'll need proper clothing. Unlock the technology and craft it at the . You'll need , which can be made from materials dropped by fluffy Pals that bear . Time to go find something soft and wooly!

missions.name: Enhance Stats
missions.description: Gaining EXP and honing your skills are the keys to overcoming the challenges ahead. Once you level up, open your inventory and enhance one of your stats. Don't fear change—after all, every journey begins with a single brave step.

missions.name: The Weakest Pal
missions.description: Only the strong survive on the Palpagos Islands. sit at the very bottom of the food chain, making them easy to catch. But don't underestimate them. Their dexterity makes them surprisingly useful for all kinds of tasks. Try capturing five to start. They'll be dependable first companions as you grow your base. Plus, they can provide essential materials like and . In this harsh world, the key to survival is simple: use every resource you can.

missions.name: Mining Paldium
missions.description: In battle, you can't dodge forever. But fear not, you can harness the power of Paldium for defense. Unlock the technology and craft it at the . Equip it ahead of time, and you'll be ready for whatever surprise attacks come your way.

missions.name: Safety Measures
missions.description: This island is full of dangers, and cliffs are one of them. One wrong step could cost you more than just a few scrapes. Unlock the technology and craft it at the . With this tool in hand, even the highest drop becomes an easy-breezy descent.

missions.name: Capture any 30 Pals.
missions.description: This device includes a feature called the Palpedia, which collects and stores information on Pals. It can hold data for up to 12 individuals per species. Capturing more Pals also rewards you with bonus EXP. Start by catching 30 different Pals. With a wide range of abilities on your team, you'll be ready to take on even more powerful foes.

missions.name: Partner Skills
missions.description: Each Pal has a unique Partner Skill with different effects depending on its species. Some can be equipped and controlled directly, while others can be ridden as mounts. First, unlock the technology and set one up at your base. Then, unlock the to craft it at your . Unlike other items, Pal Gear is stored in the Key Items space next to your Inventory.

missions.name: First Boss Battle
missions.description: Powerful Pals have carved out their own territories across the Palpagos Islands. They can be dangerous, but defeating them yields experience, and capturing them earns you formidable new allies. How you deal with them is up to you. Rumors whisper of a Pal called {targetpal} somewhere in these wilds. Track it down. Whether you capture or defeat it is up to you.

missions.name: Hunger is the Greatest Foe
missions.description: Hunger is your greatest enemy. No matter the situation, never forget to eat. Both you and your Pals can use s to help you eat while on the move. Small conveniences like these can make a big difference in both exploration and battle. Like Pal Gear, the is stored in the Key Items space next to your inventory.

missions.name: Sealed Pals
missions.description: These islands are home to a Pal known as {targetpal}. Though fierce, challenging it might be the perfect chance to put your combat skills to the test. Find it, and try capturing or defeating it.

missions.name: Pal Eggs
missions.description: Pals hatch from Pal Eggs. You can find these eggs all over the islands, so keep a sharp eye out while exploring. Raising Pals from Pal Eggs can lead you to rare and unique new allies. Who knows? One day, you might just hatch the perfect Pal. Start by unlocking the technology and setting one up at your base. Once you place an egg inside, you'll need to wait a while for it to hatch.

missions.name: A Cozy Base
missions.description: Expanding your base is essential if you want your Pals to work efficiently. Raise your base to level 7 to create a more comfortable space for them. With the right setup, you'll be strong enough to take on that tower when the time comes.

missions.name: The Girl and the Tower
missions.description: The time has come for you to challenge the tower of Zoe Rayne. Though she still doesn't fully understand the meaning of her role as its guardian, she has dutifully accepted it all the same. Claim victory in battle, and you may yet glimpse what lies beyond this tower.

missions.name: Wildlife Sanctuaries
missions.description: Around the edges of the Palpagos Islands lie restricted zones known as Wildlife Sanctuaries, home to Pals with traits unlike any others. Among them, a Pal known as {targetpal} is said to possess extraordinary power. Capturing one could unlock entirely new possibilities.

missions.name: Thou Shalt Not Harm Pals
missions.description: You took down Zoe Rayne, and obtained the Key Sphere of Envy. Your next objective is the Free Pal Alliance Tower.

missions.name: Flawless Victory Fixation
missions.description: You took down Lily Everhart, and obtained the Key Sphere of Pride. Your next objective is the Eternal Pyre Tower.

missions.name: Ruler of the Sands
missions.description: You took down Axel Travers, and obtained the Key Sphere of Sloth. Your next objective is the PIDF Tower.

missions.name: Interspecies Experiments
missions.description: You took down Marcus Dryden, and obtained the Key Sphere of Greed. Your next objective is the PAL Genetic Research Unit Tower.

missions.name: A Fine Night for a Drink
missions.description: You took down Victor Ashford, and obtained the Key Sphere of Gluttony. Your next objective is the Moonflower Tower.

missions.name: Bearer of All Burdens
missions.description: You took down Saya Kurosaki, and obtained the Key Sphere of Lust. Your next objective is the Feybreak Tower.

missions.name: The First Islander
missions.description: You wake up on a beach, but your memory is still fuzzy. Who are you, and what are you doing here? ...Where is this place? As you start looking for clues, you spot a tiny figure far off in the distance.

missions.name: Set Up a Workbench
missions.description: Harvest Wood & Build a Workbench These islands are rich in natural resources such as Wood and Stone. To conserve our supplies and continue the survey for as long as possible, we'll need to take advantage of them. First, Wood. There are two ways to gather it: either collect the wood already on the ground, or strike at a nearby tree. Once you've got those materials in hand, find a safe space and set up a Workbench.

missions.name: Enhance Stats
missions.description: Improving Your Stats Gaining EXP and honing your skills are the keys to overcoming the challenges ahead. Once you level up, open your inventory to enhance your stats. Improved abilities are crucial to streamlining your activities here.

missions.name: Catching a Pal
missions.description: Making s and Capturing Pals As you may have noticed, this island is home to a variety of strange creatures. Known as |Pals,| these intelligent creatures come in a wide range of shapes and sizes. Of course, our activities here would benefit greatly if we were able to harness their abilities. Pals can be captured by a | |. While the exact principles are still unclear, it's possible to tame any Pal by catching it with a Sphere. First, check the Technology screen for details, then obtain the required for crafting. This strange ore glows with a pale blue light, and is often found near sources of water. Once you finish building your Spheres on a Workbench, you're set to go. Make sure to wear down the Pal you want to capture. Lowering their Health will increase the chances of a successful capture. That being said, most Pals will resist capture, and will fight back. Start by focusing on smaller, weaker Pals until you get better equipment.

missions.name: Putting Pals to Work
missions.description: Pal Labor Interacting with a Palbox allows you to manage and utilize your Pals efficiently. First, check the Technology screen for details, then build a Palbox in a safe location. The Palbox can be used to store Pals you have on hand, or summon them to the box's location. Pals summoned from the Palbox can only move within a certain radius of the Palbox. As such, the location of your Palbox inevitably becomes the centerpoint of your base. Pals summoned from a Palbox will find work to occupy themselves with, based on their own unique traits. You can increase the efficiency of your operations by capturing and utilizing more Pals.

missions.name: Filling Your Belly
missions.description: Obtaining Food Long-term operations also require a reliable source of food. Luckily, the found in various locations can be consumed raw. Some wild Pals are edible, too. As heart-wrenching as it may be to butcher such adorable creatures... We must do whatever is necessary to survive.

missions.name: The Weakest Pal
missions.description: Utilizing s s lack any real sort of offensive power, making them easy to catch. Moreover, they are dexterous enough to handle a wide variety of tasks, making them an excellent choice for the early stages of any base expansion. They can also provide you with or , which are both necessary for survival. Start by capturing your own small flock, then watch your base begin to flourish.

missions.name: Gearing Up
missions.description: Crafting Equipment First, use the Wool obtained from a to craft at a Workbench, then use that to craft a set of . Next, put craft a which utilizes the self-restorative properties of Paldium. Finally, craft a , which will make it much easier to navigate the difficult terrain. Equipping these will make your activities here much easier.

missions.name: The Adventure Begins
missions.description: You've finished all the tasks displayed on the tablet, putting the information to practical use. Report back to the woman who gave you the instructions.

missions.name: Small Settlement
missions.description: You've finished all the tasks displayed on your device. According to the lone surviving surveyor, there's a settlement close to the Rayne Syndicate Tower. Once you find it, try talking to their chief to learn more.

missions.name: Crafting Pal Gear
missions.description: The settlement's chief has informed you that if you want to learn more about the history of the Palpagos Islands, then you ought to pay a visit to Zoe, the only daughter of the boss of the Rayne Syndicate. Before you do that however, the chief thinks that capturing a and creating some Pal Gear for it would go a long way to ensuring a successful visit to the tower.

missions.name: The Rayne Syndicate
missions.description: Now that you’re adequately prepared, it’s time to meet Zoe at the Rayne Syndicate Tower.

missions.name: The Key Sphere
missions.description: You defeated the young woman you believe to be Zoe, and obtained a mysterious object resembling a Pal Sphere left lying nearby. Go back to the Small Settlement and ask the Chief about it.

missions.name: Zoe Rayne
missions.description: According to the Chief, you should trying asking Zoe for more information. Make your way back to the Rayne Syndicate Tower.

missions.name: Gathering the Key Spheres
missions.description: According to Zoe, there are eight towers on the islands, each with a Key Sphere sealed inside. Collect them all to try and solve their mystery.

missions.name: The Sunreacher
missions.description: You may have beaten Auri, but it seems as if she wasn't putting her all into the fight. Something about that makes her feel different from the other tower leaders. Talk with her and find out why.

missions.name: The Calamity
missions.description: Auri is ready to provide you with information about the World Tree. She says you’re in for a long talk, so make sure you have plenty of time before you talk with her again.

missions.name: Panthalus
missions.description: You’ll need ' help to make your way into the World Tree. Seek it out and prove your strength to it.

missions.name: To the World Tree
missions.description: You’ve proven your strength to , and it’s agreed to help you break through the barrier. Head to the World Tree and find a way inside.

missions.name: Sin
missions.description: You’ve at last set foot within the World Tree. Its interior is filled with a mystical atmostphere, and yet you still feel a sense of unease. After looking around for a bit, you see someone.

missions.name: The Sealed Calamity
missions.description: The World Tree Guardian told you about the current state of the World Tree and the Calamity that sleeps at its core. The moment of truth is nearly upon you.

missions.name: Awakening
missions.description: The white dragon of the Calamity and its master have awakened from their eternal slumber. No words are exchanged. The only thing left now is to end it all.

missions.name: Crafting an Axe and a Pickaxe
missions.description: Craft an Axe and a Pickaxe: and are basic resources which are used for many things. You can pick them up off the ground, or strike at trees or rocks with your bare hands to harvest them, but... having the proper tools is essential to do so efficiently. Start by checking the recipes at a Workbench, then gather the and required to make your very own and .

missions.name: Hope Springs Eternal
missions.description: You took down Bjorn Seligsson, and obtained the Key Sphere of Wrath. Your next objective is the Azure Covenant Tower.

missions.name: Path to the Abyss
missions.description: You listened to the recording left behind by a guardian stationed near the center of the World Tree. Use the attached coordinates to find further leads.

missions.name: Pal's Blessing
missions.description: If you've got a Pal that's good at watering, could you let me have it? Sure, I could haul water from the river myself, but Pals just seem to have the magic touch— the vegetables always grow bigger and happier with their help. Please lend me a hand, will you?

missions.name: Hungry for Recruits
missions.description: I've still got some cake left over... Would one of your Pals like a bite? If they've got a big appetite, they might just jump for joy! So, what do you say? It's scrumptious, I promise!

missions.name: A Special Dish
missions.description: Go to the entrance of the nearby settlement and find someone who looks like they know what they're doing! Please make sure it gets delivered, all right? And once you're done, I'll be waiting right here with a thank-you gift!

missions.name: Medical Bills
missions.description: I'm so close to being able to afford the treatment. I just need another 5,000 Gold Coins. Please, I'm begging you...could you help me?

missions.name: Prove the Legend!
missions.description: Now then, off you go! Find those legendary Pals! We know there's at least one in each of these places: the Astral Mountains to the north, the Desiccated Dunes to the east, and the far-off land known as Sunreach. Climb up that big rocky outcrop over there to get a clear view of the area. And remember... I'm counting on you!

missions.name: Lock In
missions.description: Ugh, I have ZERO motivation to do...well, anything at all. Any luck finding me a Pal to boost my work efficiency? Ideally one that can scale steep mountains with ease. That'd get my butt in gear.

missions.name: Give a Fuack
missions.description: Well? I can't stand the suspense! Did you find me a Fuack?

missions.name: Metal on Your Mind
missions.description: So? Have you gathered any Chromite yet? If you had a metal detector, you might be able to uncover some buried somewhere on this island. Keep your eyes peeled, now.

missions.name: Breeding Basics
missions.description: Hey, did you manage to get those cakes? Five might be a bit much, but I'm serious about this breeding business. I'm counting on you!

missions.name: Farewell Under the Sakura Tree
missions.description: Don't tell me—you brought some Advanced Recovery Meds to share?!

missions.name: No Mercy for Pal Thieves
missions.description: Please, you've gotta get my precious Pal back from those Rayne Syndicate goons! Hurry, they climbed up that ledge over there!

missions.name: Operation: Splatterina Spree
missions.description: Do you have any Splatterinas for me? Ten should be plenty for breeding. I'm counting on you!

missions.name: Hunting Essentials
missions.description: I wonder if there's a calm, cool-headed Pal out there that can glide over sand like it's surfing. If you find one with an aura of Serenity, be sure to let me know!

missions.name: The Fugitive
missions.description: I'll never forgive that creep... They're just up ahead. Please, give them the ass-kicking they deserve!

missions.name: Formidable Faleris Aqua
missions.description: That massive Faleris Aqua is a real menace. If you're planning on taking it on, double-check your gear first...or else.

missions.name: A Sweet Deal
missions.description: Have you found any Beegardes or Elizabees for me? Just three'll do!

missions.name: A True Ascent Ends in Descent
missions.description: I heard Wumpos are super strong! I wonder if they'd help me carry my stuff...

missions.name: Sparkly and Smooth
missions.description: The sparkly stuff you see at night is called Nightstar Sand. It starts to glow after the sun sets. If you've got any to spare, could you share some with me? Ten should be enough.

missions.name: Dungeon Hunt
missions.description: Found a Tombat yet? I've got a special item for you once you do!

missions.name: Easygoing Adventures
missions.description: I wonder if there's an Easygoing Yakumo out there somewhere... I'd love to take a slow walk through these falling cherry blossoms with a Pal like that by my side.

missions.name: Don't Get Cocky
missions.description: So, did you manage to catch that Grizzbolt? I heard there are plenty of other powerful Pals in the No. 1 Wildlife Sanctuary, too. Probably a bit too much for you to handle. But if you really want my approval, you’d better give it everything you’ve got.

missions.name: I Still Don't Trust You
missions.description: Did you take care of those Free Pal Alliance weirdos for me? Or did you chicken out? Figures... Guess asking you was a mistake after all. Maybe I should just take care of it myself.

missions.name: A Warm Memory
missions.description: Did you find what I asked for? I think I left it near some old ruins, or what was left of them... But I guess there's no way it'd still be there. It's been years. Don't worry about it. I wasn't really expecting anything anyway.

missions.name: A Fine Day for Fishing
missions.description: Having any luck with fishing? You should be able to find {PalName} in these waters. If you manage to catch one, I hope you'll be generous enough to share a bit of its meat with me!

missions.name: Request from a Wise Hunter
missions.description: Hey... I'm the one who monitors the balance of this region's ecosystem, keeping an eye on the Pal population. Right now, I’m looking for someone who can help reduce their numbers

missions.name: Request from a Veteran Hunter
missions.description: Your eyes are no ordinary ones... A gaze sharp as that of a hunter, truly remarkable. I have a task I wish to entrust to someone of your skill.

missions.name: Request from a Pal Ecological Researcher
missions.description: Nice to meet you. I'm researching Pal species and conducting an ecological survey, including unidentified species in this area... You have a Palpedia, don't you? Would you mind showing it to me for reference?

missions.name: Request from an Arrogant Foodie
missions.description: Well, well...I'm the esteemed gourmet critic and chief advisor to the Palpagos Gourmet Society. I'll grace your dish with my refined palate, young upstart. Though I doubt a drifter like you could possibly satisfy my discerning tastes.

missions.name: That's That Me, Depresso!
missions.description: Stop right there! I'm no Pal—don't throw that Sphere! Oh, it's just you! You're here about the costume, yeah? Haha! So, got the goods? I need 20 High-Quality Cloth and 100 Venom Glands. It takes tons of Venom Glands to nail Depresso's beautiful coat, you know.

missions.name: Zoe's Sphere
missions.description: Not taken care of it yet? I told you, teach those guys a lesson and I'll hook you up with a Sphere.

missions.name: Happy Halloween!
missions.description: (...Ears like Cattiva's might be kinda cute... If I'm going with ears, I have to add a tail too... And maybe... Hmm...)

missions.name: That's That Me, Depresso!
missions.description: Stop right there! I'm no Pal—don't throw that Sphere! Oh, it's just you! You're here about the costume, yeah? Haha! So, got the goods? I need 20 High-Quality Cloth and 100 Venom Glands. It takes tons of Venom Glands to nail Depresso's beautiful coat, you know.

missions.name: Captured Adventurer
missions.description: You freed who you presume is an islander, but that drew the attention of some Rayne Syndicate members. Drive them off and secure the area.

missions.name: Taking Down a Bounty
missions.description: You've run into the adventurer, Harold again, who's stuck between a rocky situation and some tough foes. He's thrilled to fight with his buddy in arms, and between the two of you, taking out those bounties should be a piece of cake.

missions.name: The Proxy
missions.description: You've run into Harold again, but he's lost his usual cheerfulness. He took on a request from a nearby village, but it's one that involves subduing a rampaging Pal. He explained the situation with the grimmest expression you've ever seen on him, then asked if you couldn't take this one on in his stead. The moment you agreed, you could see the weight lift from his shoulders, but...the shadows on his face still seemed to deepen.

missions.name: The Past
missions.description: Harold asked if he can confess something to you. You suspect that he either wants forgiveness for an event in his past, or that he's hoping to bequeath a memory to someone, so that it outlasts him. Standing at the base of the World Tree, his determined expression is so firmly set, you find him impossible to read.

missions.name: The Knight’s Last Stand
missions.description: You serve as witness to the conclusion of their story.

missions.name: The Rookie Expedition Team
missions.description: You suddenly came upon a group of three who were fatigued from fighting against Pals. You should lend them a hand.

missions.name: Budding
missions.description: You met with the Expedition Team once more, but this time, Carla is nowhere to be seen...

missions.name: Growth
missions.description: You ran into Fia once again. She seems to be searching for some way to become stronger.

missions.name: A Sterile Flower
missions.description: This time, Fia attacked you the moment her vacant eyes spotted you. The only way you'll survive is by fighting her.

missions.name: The Sable Loner
missions.description: You found a wounded .

missions.name: Reminiscent Wandering
missions.description: Look for any clues that point to 's master.

missions.name: The Unsheathed Katana
missions.description: You agreed to take care of the vicious Pal.

missions.name: Stockpiling Sulfur
missions.description: Gather 10 and deliver them to the client.

missions.name: Stockpiling Hardwood
missions.description: Gather 10 and deliver them to the client.

missions.name: Stockpiling Pure Quartz
missions.description: Gather 10 and deliver them to the client.

missions.name: Stockpiling Hexolite Quartz
missions.description: Gather 10 and deliver them to the client.

missions.name: Stockpiling Soralite
missions.description: Gather 10 and deliver them to the client.

missions.name: Surviving the World Tree
missions.description: Gather a and a , then report to the client.
